value:
v1.12.1 shipped 2026-04-16 (#74 auto-backup project scope, #75 encrypted roundtrip). v1.12.2 consolidated export/import integrity patch covers #78 (export envelope), #76 (single-file export-all), #77 (transactional multi-section imports via new saveAll), #79 (non-string leaf rejection), #80 (import_max_bytes size cap, default 50 MB).

CURRENT STATE: v1.12.2-beta.1 prepared 2026-04-16 — bumped from beta.0 to pick up #87 fix (saveAll now stamps _meta on import so restored entries aren't [untracked]). Commits 08ed455 (fix+test) and the upcoming release bump are LOCAL — user tags and pushes release commits themselves per session.last.

Next steps: user to tag v1.12.2-beta.1 and push; soak the new beta; cut stable v1.12.2 after clean soak. v1.12.x export/import integrity chain then done.

Also filed during this session: #88 (askPassword non-interactive path, v1.13.0 milestone) — out-of-scope enhancement found while flogging encrypted roundtrip. Don't address during 1.12.x.
